name: Infrastructure Inventory — Domains, Mail Seats, and Internal Sheet Registry
subject: Consolidated inventory of Comeketo's digital infrastructure — 7 owned domains + 6 Microsoft 365 mail seats across four brand identities (Comeketo, VirtualKitchenhall, MoneyOnYourWay, RioFitMeals) plus a Wordpress hosting pair, and a hand-curated registry of ~20 internal Google Sheets with owner, user list, and purpose. Together these files expose the real surface area Comeketo operates across — more brands than the sales decks suggest, and a sprawling sheet-based operating system with multiple authoritative owners. This is foundational data for any automation the agent builds because it documents where the source-of-truth sheets actually live and who controls them.
source_files: Google Sheet Management - a sheet for the sheets lol _)  - Overall Info.csv

owned_domains.note: Alternate primary. Both comeketo.com and comeketocatering.com in active use.
Separate brand — fitness meal prep product. Not in any other indexed file. Flag for clarification.
Separate brand — virtual kitchen concept. Multiple sheets are owned by 'office@virtualkitchenhall.com', so this is actively used as an ops identity, not a parked domain.
Separate brand — unclear purpose. Has dedicated M365 seats ('now@' and 'info@moneyonyourway.com'). Probably Rodrigo's financial/coaching venture. Flag for clarification.

microsoft_365_mail_seats.note: Pricing mismatch — plan says 'Email Essentials' (should be $9.99/mo like operations@) but billed at $23.99. Likely a bundled plan that needs reconciliation.
Bibi has a dedicated mail seat — consistent with her Captain/Food-Allotment role. She reads and writes official email.
The most expensive seat — Enterprise tier. Likely Rodrigo's master account.

wordpress_hosting.product: Basic Managed hosting for Wordpress - SSL included - 1 year
Basic Managed hosting for Wordpress - SSL included - 1 year
wordpress_hosting.note: Site #2 — second wordpress install, likely the paired sibling domain.

annual_cost_rollup.note: Approximate — pulled from the 'Yearly amount' column. Real billed total may differ due to the $9.99→$23.99 pricing anomaly on catering@comeketo.com.

signals_for_agent.multi_brand_reality: The Comeketo-branded story in the sales decks is one of four active brand identities Rodrigo runs (Comeketo, VirtualKitchenhall, MoneyOnYourWay, RioFitMeals). Any agent prospecting/replying as 'Comeketo' needs to know which mailbox it's sending from and not leak cross-brand context.
signals_for_agent.operational_mailboxes: operations@comeketo.com, info@comeketo.com, catering@comeketo.com, bibi@comeketo.com, comeketo@comeketo.com are the five Comeketo mailboxes. Rodbot outbound should use one of these (likely operations@ or info@) and never from the sibling-brand domains.
signals_for_agent.cost_per_seat_range: $9.99 (Essentials) to $37.98 (Enterprise). Seat count (6 Comeketo seats) gives a rough staff-with-email census that's tighter than the 17-person staff roster — most crew/cooks do NOT have company mail. Office/management-only.

marketing_sheets.purpose: Manage work/effort to gain more venue partners and track which rep is responsible for each partner.
marketing_sheets.cross_reference: knowledge/venue_partners.json — already indexed from the source CSV.

marketing_sheets.note: Camila-owned leads tracker — separate from the FB/IG/Google Dec-2025 tracker. Could be the master leads sheet. Flag for raw-data request.

marketing_sheets.sheet: Facebook Links - for all wedding groups
marketing_sheets.purpose: Which FB wedding groups to reach out to, which has most activity. Used for direct outreach to potential clients and vendor partners.
marketing_sheets.note: The organic-social engine's playbook. Cross-refs to 'Social Organic' (2 closes) and 'FB/IG/Crisp Chat' (3 closes) as top-performing December channels — this sheet is likely the source of that pipeline.

marketing_sheets.sheet: List of links for EXPOS conferences - Cathlyn
marketing_sheets.purpose: Cathlyn is going after EXPOs in other spaces to get us in so we can offer our services for other businesses.
marketing_sheets.note: Cathlyn-owned B2B/expo pipeline. Distinct from wedding-vertical work. Possible corporate/EZ-Cater feeder.

marketing_sheets.purpose: Manage approach to gain new relationships, track what stage of rapport-building they're at.
marketing_sheets.note: Owned by the VirtualKitchenhall mailbox even though the subject is Instagram/relationship-building for Comeketo. Confirms cross-brand identity use for ops.

marketing_sheets.purpose: List of Brazilian churches we can prospect.
Large list of venues in Massachusetts and surrounding states.
marketing_sheets.note: A prospecting list of venues (distinct from venue_partners.json which tracks ACTIVE partners). Worth ingesting — would feed venue-outreach campaigns.

marketing_sheets.purpose: Sheet given to couples who close with us to be used for wedding planning.
marketing_sheets.note: Post-close client deliverable — the One-Stop Shop wedding-planner template referenced in 'Beyond Catering' deck. Likely the translated (Portuguese→English) master template. Important artifact for understanding what the One-Stop Shop actually IS.

operational_sheets.purpose: Weekly sales subtotal, food allotment, labor allotment.
operational_sheets.note: This is the upstream sheet feeding the kitchen-schedule's bandwidth calculation. Anne/Camila/Rod own the per-week financial picture. Could be a very high-leverage sheet for the agent to read.

operational_sheets.purpose: Labor cost — tracking what we actually used for labor those weeks.
operational_sheets.note: Multi-year labor data — would enable labor-cost trend analysis and coaching. Flag for raw-data request.
Likely a map visualization of preferred venues. Could be complementary to venue_partners.json spatial dimension.

operational_sheets.sheet: Total Number of events in 2025 & Headcount
operational_sheets.purpose: How well are we doing with number of events, how many people are we serving, how many bar services monthly.
operational_sheets.note: Headcount and event-count rollup. Would answer 'how big is Comeketo?' in revenue-agnostic terms.

operational_sheets.sheet: LATEST Pricing Guide & FAQ - Comeketo Catering
operational_sheets.purpose: All pricing, FAQ, packages, menu descriptions, allergy concerns.
operational_sheets.note: CRITICAL asset not yet in raw data. The sales decks reference 'Deluxe Churrasco' packages and pricing in general terms but the canonical pricing document is this sheet. ABSOLUTELY should be pulled into the bedrock — Rodbot cannot quote prices or packages without it. Flag as P0 raw-data request.

operational_sheets.purpose: All the info about feedback when running the AI.
operational_sheets.note: EXTREMELY RELEVANT to the Rodbot build. This is the team's existing AI-agent feedback log. Rhonna, Eufy, and Rodrigo are the humans loop-closing on a prior AI agent — almost certainly contains lessons about where the existing agent fails. Would inform Rodbot's character/traits directly. P0 raw-data request.

operational_sheets.cross_reference: Source for this very knowledge file — the GoDaddy product CSV.

operational_sheets.sheet: Monthly average for Anne, Carlos and Bibi - October/March
operational_sheets.note: Sounds like a payroll/hours-average sheet for the three full-time Captains (Anne-Carlos-Bibi). Flag for raw-data pull — would round out the labor picture.

accounting_sheets.note: Source file ends at the 'Accounting / Expenses' section header without enumerated sheets. Section exists but is either empty or truncated in the export. Flag for resubmission with accounting section populated.

new_management_layer_candidates.name: Cathlyn
new_management_layer_candidates.signals: Multi-sheet access, EXPO pipeline owner, appears in labor-report and venue-partner users. Likely part of management/sales leadership. Note: 'Cath' in kitchen schedule's labor-allotment owner column is probably Cathlyn.

new_management_layer_candidates.name: Eufy
new_management_layer_candidates.signals: Venue partners, IG insights, FB groups. Sales ops / relationship management. Unknown last name.

new_management_layer_candidates.name: Rena
new_management_layer_candidates.signals: Venue partners, IG, FB groups. Same cluster as Eufy — marketing/outreach team.

new_management_layer_candidates.name: Rhonna
new_management_layer_candidates.signals: Venue partners, leads tracker, events-of-the-week, AI-agent-adjustment sheet, GoDaddy access. Possibly a central ops person. Access to financial + pricing + AI-agent-feedback is significant.

new_management_layer_candidates.name: Camila
new_management_layer_candidates.signals: Venue partners, leads tracker, IG, Brazilian churches, events-of-the-week, total-events-2025, venue map. Very broad access — likely GM/ops manager. Confirmed as 'week value' KPI owner in kitchen schedule.

new_management_layer_candidates.name: Anne
new_management_layer_candidates.signals: Events-of-the-week, labor report, monthly-average-with-Carlos-Bibi. Finance/operations. Confirmed as cash-flow sheet forecaster.

new_management_layer_candidates.name: Dom
new_management_layer_candidates.signals: Cash-flow sheet author — not in this inventory but surfaced earlier.

new_management_layer_candidates.name: Cath
new_management_layer_candidates.signals: Appears as 'Cath' in kitchen-schedule labor-allotment owner. Very likely Cathlyn shortened. Reconcile when creating person record.

people_discovered_in_these_files.recommendation: Eventually create people/* records for Cathlyn, Eufy, Rena, Rhonna, Camila, Anne, Dom. Wait for richer signal (an email they're on, a deal they closed, an explicit mention) before promoting — but the signals above are already material.

rodbot_voice_implications.brand_identity_awareness: Rodbot speaks FOR Comeketo. When composing outbound, Rodbot should use a @comeketo.com or @comeketocatering.com address and must never leak context from VirtualKitchenhall, MoneyOnYourWay, or RioFitMeals — those are parallel brands with different voices and audiences.
rodbot_voice_implications.sheet_as_source_of_truth: Rodbot must understand that the sheets listed here ARE the operating system. When the user or a teammate references 'the leads tracker' or 'the venue partners sheet', they mean a specific Google Sheet in this registry with a specific owner. Rodbot should be able to route questions to the right sheet owner rather than guessing.
rodbot_voice_implications.existing_ai_feedback_loop: There's already an AI agent in play being tuned by Rhonna, Eufy, Rodrigo. Rodbot is the successor or sibling. The adjustment sheet is where lessons live — Rodbot's own refinement should tap that same feedback channel when it exists.

feeds_into: A future infrastructure/billing dashboard — the GoDaddy costs are real recurring OpEx that the agent can surface.
A future sheet-ingestion pipeline — the sheet registry tells the agent WHICH sheets to pull and how often.
Rodbot mailbox-routing logic — when composing outbound, pick the right from: address based on the recipient and context.
people/* records for management layer — pending richer signal per rule above.
gap_to_close: The P0 raw-data requests: 'LATEST Pricing Guide & FAQ', 'Comeketo AI AGENT - Adjustment', 'Events of the week', and the 'Accounting / Expenses' section.
Brand-relationship clarity: How do VirtualKitchenhall, MoneyOnYourWay, RioFitMeals relate to Comeketo operationally and to Rodrigo personally? Get one-liner on each.
catering@comeketo.com pricing anomaly ($9.99 plan priced at $23.99) — resolve with GoDaddy billing.

notes: This knowledge file consolidates two small, dry CSVs into a single infrastructure picture because neither on its own was big enough to warrant a standalone file but together they define 'what exists'.
The sheet registry ends abruptly at the 'Accounting / Expenses' header — the source export may have been truncated. Worth re-requesting a full version.

The multi-brand picture (4 sibling brands under Rodrigo's GoDaddy account) is the first clear signal that 'Comeketo Catering' is one vertical in a broader Rodrigo-operated business family. The other brands should NOT bleed into Rodbot's Comeketo-voice output without explicit user direction.
'admin@comeketocatering.com' appears as both an owner email AND a user access point — it's likely the master admin mailbox for shared drive ownership.

sources.diff: Indexed GoDaddy product inventory (7 domains + 8 M365 seats + 2 Wordpress hosts, ~$2,476/yr total) and the Google Sheet Management registry (~20 sheets across Marketing/Operational/Accounting sections with owner-email, user-list, purpose). Surfaced 4 sibling brand identities (Comeketo, VirtualKitchenhall, MoneyOnYourWay, RioFitMeals), 7 net-new management-layer people candidates (Cathlyn, Eufy, Rena, Rhonna, Camila, Anne, Dom), and 2 P0 raw-data requests ('LATEST Pricing Guide & FAQ', 'Comeketo AI AGENT - Adjustment').
